one_time_cost: CI/local compute only; no deploy, no D1/R2 op, no API call
value: install the task-level anti-black-hole framework: 90-task machine index (unique + acyclic, verified by check_dag), evidence schema validator (missing evidence -> INCOMPLETE, never PASS), dependency-aware task_runner (BLOCKED_BY_DEPS gate), and evidence template; enforces one-task-one-result, machine-acceptance, and no implementer self-signed PASS
